title: brachylaena discolor subsp. transvaalensis
intro: Brachylaena discolor subsp. transvaalensis, also known as Transvaal hairy twig or Yellow-barked brachylaena, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant's health benefits include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Brachylaena discolor subsp. transvaalensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often prepared from the leaves and stems of the plant.
